query:
SELECT 
  dc.contract_external_id,
  dc.period,
  dc.section AS collected_section,
  MAX(dt.period) AS max_target_period,
  dt.section AS target_section
FROM debt_collected_cache dc
LEFT JOIN debt_target_cache dt 
  ON dc.contract_external_id = dt.contract_external_id
WHERE dc.debt_range IS NULL
  AND dc.is_bad_debt_row = 0
  AND dc.is_close_row = 0
GROUP BY dc.contract_external_id, dc.period, dc.section, dt.section
HAVING MAX(dt.period) IS NULL OR dc.period > MAX(dt.period)
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
  dc.contract_external_id,
  dc.period,
  dc.section AS collected_section,
  MAX(dt.period) AS max_target_period,
  dt.section AS target_section
FROM debt_collected_cache dc
LEFT JOIN debt_target_cache dt 
  ON dc.contract_external_id = dt.contract_external_id
WHERE dc.debt_range IS NULL
  AND dc.is_bad_debt_row = 0
  AND dc.is_close_row = 0
GROUP BY dc.contract_external_id, dc.period, dc.section, dt.section
HAVING MAX(dt.period) IS NULL OR dc.period > MAX(dt.period)
LIMIT 10;
